description:
Phase 1B of bl-f021, sibling of bl-203e (Phase 1A). Filed 2026-05-25 when bl-203e was split.

## Scope

Per SPEC-clone-layout §3, §5, §6.4, §7, §11, §12.

### Implements

1. **`bl init` rewrite — XDG only.**
   - No `.balls/` at the clone root, no `.gitignore` entry, no `balls: initialize` commit on main.
   - Pushes a `balls/tasks` orphan branch with default `repo.json` + `project.json`, no `tracker.json` (solo case).
   - `bl init --stealth [--tasks-dir <path>]` writes `~/.config/balls/<nested-clone-path>/clone.json` with `stealth: true` + `tasks_dir`. No origin requirement; no `trackers/` subtree.
   - §14.1, §14.19 (no on-main writes in steady state).

2. **Mass migration of init-touching tests.** Each test that called `bl init` now gets XDG paths back; assertions update from `repo.path().join(".balls/...")` to the XDG tracker checkout / per-clone tree. `tests/common/mod.rs` helpers (`read_task_json`, `git_state`, `commit_state_repo`, `push`) gain a layout-aware discovery hook (resolve the state checkout via balls::store::Store).

### Conformance tests

§14.1 (XDG paths from `bl init`), §14.4 (bootstrap branch constant — bl init writes `origin balls/tasks`, no config field overrides), §14.15 stealth init writing clone.json, §14.19 (no main commits across full lifecycle — half-gated; full gate needs claim XDG too).

### Explicitly NOT in scope

- `bl claim` worktree relocation — Phase 1C.
- Tests that don't touch `bl init` — Phase 1C.
- `bl migrate` — Phase 2.

## Dependencies

Hard depends on bl-203e (Phase 1A landed).
title: Phase 1B: bl init XDG-only flip
